answers: Instagram growth: post consistently, use relevant hashtags, engage with your audience, create Reels (they get more reach), and have a clear niche.
YouTube tips: good thumbnail + title = clicks. First 30 seconds must hook viewers. Post consistently, optimize SEO, and engage with comments.
Content creation basics: find your niche, be consistent, provide value, engage with your community, and don't chase trends blindly - be authentic.
Going viral isn't a strategy - consistency is. Post daily, study what works in your niche, use trending audio/formats, and always add value.
